name: Cashew Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter 2 large baking sheets; set aside.
2. In a saucepan, combine sugar, corn syrup, butter, and water. Cook over medium-high heat to boiling, stirring constantly to dissolve the sugar.
3. Continue cooking, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches the soft crack stage. Stir in chopped cashews and continue cooking, stirring frequently, until it reaches the hard crack stage.
4. Remove from heat; quickly sprinkle in sifted baking soda over the mixture, stirring constantly.
5. Immediately pour the mixture onto the prepared pans. Allow to cool completely before breaking into pieces.
6. Store tightly covered.
